If you're looking for a truly custom garage door in the East Bay—not just a catalog replacement—the strongest options tend to fall into two categories: local installers/design-build firms and specialty manufacturers that work through Bay Area dealers.

### Top East Bay Custom Garage Door Companies

  * R & P Garage Doors  
One of the most established East Bay specialists. They handle custom wood, steel, and copper doors and have decades of experience with higher-end residential projects. Particularly worth considering for traditional, carriage-house, and architectural custom work. [R & P GARAGE DOORS - 203 Surveys, Videos, Articles, & More | Diamond Certified](https://www.diamondcertified.org/report/r-p-garage-doors/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Precision Garage Door of East Bay  
Offers custom wood doors and an online design tool that lets homeowners visualize styles, windows, and finishes before ordering. Good option if you want to explore design variations quickly. [Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Door Pros  
Strong reputation for premium residential installations and access to high-end door lines including wood, glass, aluminum, and insulated architectural designs. [Residential & Commercial Garage Door Services - Door Pros](https://www.doorpros.com/garage-door-services/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Mid-Valley Garage Door  
Family-operated company that emphasizes custom-home aesthetics and on-site design consultations. Particularly useful if you're trying to elevate a standard tract home with a more bespoke appearance. [Mid Valley Garage Door – 25 years of service](https://midvalleygaragedoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Madden Door and Sons  
Longtime East Bay provider carrying custom wood, carriage, insulated, and specialty doors. A solid choice for homeowners seeking a traditional custom look. [Madden Door and Sons, Inc. Garage Door Specialist - Martinez, CA. Projects, photos, reviews and more | Porch](https://pro.porch.com/martinez-ca/garage-door-specialists/madden-door-and-sons-inc-/pp?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### For Ultra-Premium Architectural Projects

Many East Bay architects and luxury-home builders source doors from specialty manufacturers and have local installers handle the project:

  * Cambek Designer Doors — handcrafted, fully custom wood doors designed around the home's architecture. [Custom Designed Garage Doors & Entry Doors | Cambek™ Designer Doors](https://cambek.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Custom Designed Garage Doors & Entry Doors | Cambek™ Designer Doors](https://cambek.com/home/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Rundum Meir — unique side-sliding garage door systems often used in high-end modern homes. [Home - Custom Garage Doors - Rundum Meir](https://rundummeir.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Artisan Doorworks — luxury custom doors for historic restorations and architect-designed homes. [Custom Garage Doors To Elevate Your Home](https://artisandoorworks.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### Which One I'd Choose

Situation| Best Fit  
---|---  
Luxury modern home| Door Pros or Rundum Meir  
Custom wood Craftsman or traditional home| R & P Garage Doors  
Need design visualization and many style options| Precision Garage Door of East Bay  
High-end architect-driven custom build| Cambek Designer Doors  
Historic home restoration| Artisan Doorworks  
  
If you tell me:

  * your city (Oakland, Berkeley, Walnut Creek, Lafayette, etc.),

  * your home's style (Craftsman, Mid-Century, Modern, Spanish, Victorian),

  * and your approximate budget,

I can narrow it down to the 3–5 firms most likely to deliver the look you're after.
